description: Step 3 of ADR-001's locked 5-phase migration: add .opencode/bin/skill-advisor-launcher.cjs and system_skill_advisor MCP registrations in OpenCode, Codex, Claude, and Gemini. Preserve spec_kit_memory unchanged, keep advisor_* tool ids stable, use SYSTEM_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR env override before the package-local skill-graph.sqlite default, and prove cold-start build behavior.
